finding_results.notes: Recast the blackout and aftermath negatives into complete sentences while keeping the pressure compressed and physical. Also normalized the same clipped-negative habit in Yusuf's diagnosis line so the chapter no longer leans on 'Not X' / 'No Y' shorthand at pressure beats.

Removed the repeated computing-language drift from Kai's running and blackout experience, replacing it with body-first phrasing rooted in balance, muscle, stride, and injury. Literal bridge terminology remains only where it names actual implant behavior rather than turning Kai into a machine metaphor.

summary: Revised the blackout/crash sequence and medical follow-through to eliminate clipped negative shorthand and reduce repeated computer-metaphor language, preserving the chapter's bodily horror, injury specificity, and virus reveal.
